SourceProxy.name: AdaptiveOutlierRemoval
SourceProxy.label: Adaptive outlier removal

Documentation.long_help: Adaptive outlier removal of pointcloud based on the average distance of neighboring points

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter identifies outliers in a point cloud based on the average distance of neighboring points. The threshold can be defined adaptivly with respect to the depth of points.

StringVectorProperty.name: Depth array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Choose the input array of depth value

IntVectorProperty.name: Enable adaptive outlier removal
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If enable adaptive outlier removal, the threshold value is computed with the fonction of the depth. If the average distance threshold is not set to zero, the threshold is the max value between the "Average distance threshold" and the value of the linear function

IntVectorProperty.name: Number of neighbors
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Number of neighbors used to compute the average distance between one point and its neighbors

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Average distance threshold
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: The threshold to remove one point. If the average distance between one point and its neighbors is greater than the threshold, the point is considered as an isolated point and should be removed.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Factor
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: The factor of the linear function of depth to define the threshold The default linear function is based on the arc length of an angular resolution : Threshold = angular resolution * depth The default value is computed based on an angular resolution 0.2° (0.2 * pi / 180)
